allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "" } | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host "Server stopped")

PowerShell($procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($procs\) { Stop-Process -Id $procs -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed: $procs" } else { Write-Host "No process on 8000" }; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Host "Done")
Bash(cat ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null | head -20; cat ~/.ssh/config 2>/dev/null; cat D:/dram_ssd_compare/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -v SECRET)
